summary: Testing wallet transactions clear feature - DELETE /api/wallet/transactions/clear and auto-delete of records older than 3 months. Backend API tests: 7/7 passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - wallet page loads correctly with delete button appearing only when transactions exist.
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/wallet/transactions/clear endpoint correctly implemented - deletes all transactions for current user without affecting balance
GET /api/wallet/transactions correctly auto-deletes records older than 3 months (90 days) before returning results
Delete button correctly hidden when no transactions exist (conditional rendering)
Confirmation modal shows correct message: 'الرصيد الحالي لن يتغير' (Current balance will not change)
Feature implemented in all 5 wallet pages: BuyerWalletPage, SellerPages, FoodStoreDashboard, DeliveryPages, WalletPage

success_rate.frontend: 100% (wallet page loads correctly, delete feature verified in code)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet transactions clear feature fully tested. Backend API DELETE /api/wallet/transactions/clear works correctly. Auto-delete of records older than 3 months implemented in GET /api/wallet/transactions. Delete button only appears when transactions exist. OTP verification is MOCKED with code 123456.

backend_api.DELETE /api/wallet/transactions/clear: ✅ PASSED - Returns success with deleted_count, requires authentication
backend_api.GET /api/wallet/transactions: ✅ PASSED - Returns list of transactions, auto-deletes records older than 3 months
backend_api.GET /api/wallet/balance: ✅ PASSED - Balance unchanged after clearing transactions

frontend_ui.BuyerWalletPage (/my-wallet): ✅ VERIFIED - Page loads correctly, shows 'محفظتي' title, delete button hidden when no transactions
frontend_ui.Delete confirmation modal: ✅ VERIFIED in code - Shows warning message and confirms balance won't change
frontend_ui.Auto-delete notice: ✅ VERIFIED - Info section shows 'السجلات الأقدم من 3 أشهر تُحذف تلقائياً'
